subject: [PATCH v3 2/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Posted an initial patch to fix a build failure on 32-bit ARM caused by u64 inode numbers. Replaced problematic division with bitwise AND operation and added compile-time assertion for NILFS_BMAP_GROUP_DIV.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes a build failure on 32-bit ARM caused by the introduction of u64 inode numbers, which triggers undefined division operations. It replaces the problematic division with a bitwise AND operation and adds a compile-time assertion to ensure that NILFS_BMAP_GROUP_DIV is a power of two.
